overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character walking through ancient Alexandria toward the Library of Alexandria. The scene features historic stone architecture with Roman and Egyptian influences, cobblestone streets, palm trees, and NPCs including pedestrians and mounted riders on horses and camels.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market street with colonnade buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the cobblestone street between colonnade buildings and market stalls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green robes standing near market stall

entered.detail: uneven stone paving with grass growing between cracks
two-story stone buildings with rows of columns and balconies
wooden tables covered with white cloths displaying goods
tall palm trees visible above the building rooftops
tall pointed stone monument visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow cobblestone street lined with Roman-style colonnade buildings on the left and market stalls on the right. Palm trees are visible above the rooftops in the distance, and a stone obelisk marks the end of the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza in front of the Library of Alexandria

events.description: exits narrow street into wide open plaza with the Library of Alexandria facade visible ahead
mounted riders on horses and camels cross the plaza in front of the character

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward the library while navigating around mounted traffic

notable_agents.action: camel with rider crossing from left to right in front of the character
horse with rider galloping across the plaza

entered.detail: massive two-story building with green marble columns and red roof accents
large classical statues flanking the library entrance
tall stone obelisk with hieroglyphic carvings
vertical red banners hanging between the columns

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide sunlit plaza facing the grand Library of Alexandria. The massive facade with its green marble columns and white statues dominates the view. Mounted riders on horses and camels cross the cobblestone plaza, while the character navigates through the open space toward the building.

events.description: text 'Library of Alexandria' appears on screen identifying the location
character slows and looks around at the plaza before continuing toward the entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the library entrance while observing the architecture and passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark robes walking past the character toward the entrance

entered.detail: main doorway with dark interior visible between the columns
tall polished green marble columns supporting the portico

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the monumental entrance of the Library of Alexandria, passing between the large white marble statues flanking the steps. The camera moves closer to the green marble columns and carved stone facade as pedestrians in ancient dress walk by, and on-screen text identifies the location as the Library of Alexandria.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow urban corridor that opens into a grand, sunlit architectural plaza. It begins with the character walking down a cobblestone street lined with Roman-style colonnades and market stalls, moving toward a distant stone obelisk. As the character emerges from the street, the view expands into a wide plaza where mounted riders on horses and camels cross the open space toward the massive facade of the Library of Alexandria. The scene then shifts closer to the building, passing between towering white marble statues that flank the entrance. Finally, the camera glides toward the green marble columns and carved stone facade as pedestrians in ancient dress pass by, culminating in the arrival at the monumental entrance.
